title: centella macroda
intro: Centella macroda, also known as Indian pennywort, is a perennial plant native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centella macroda include improved cognitive function, reduced anxiety and stress, enhanced skin health, and improved cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products such as capsules, teas, and topical creams, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Chinese medicine.
